---
layout: default
title: "Dumka and Jharkhand Daily News Brief"
date: 2026-06-26T11:21:46.971701+00:00
summary: "Crime reports, road tragedies, and government recruitment updates dominate the news across Dumka and Jharkhand today"
run_time_ist: "4:51PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Dumka Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:51PM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Suspicious death:</strong> Police are investigating the discovery of a woman&#x27;s body in a well near the Jharkhand-Bengal border.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTFBYODJpUlRPQ3ZNdFZFUDhTaGR0a0N3OGZneGNNVXY3cmJzOG9VNzNzZFlWUDVyWmttRU9UajFyNXM4SE41MEQzakNDWQ?oc=5">L1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Student assault:</strong> A sixth-grade student was hospitalized after being severely beaten by a teacher for failing to answer a question.</li>
  <li><strong>Liquor seizure:</strong> Bounsi police arrested a woman traveling on a bus on the Bhagalpur-Dumka route for carrying illegal alcohol.</li>
  <li><strong>Muharram observance:</strong> Devotees in Dumka participated in the traditional Tazia procession.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQcTNjaVpBVTJTbXFpTFpGM0NvZXJrLXdaRXFla3pwQ1NMTkFwSHNKMHAwZUFfODBiVWM5RkV4eG0tb0xtcjVWZ1dHdnJsdWs2MTBUbTBOLXI2TjExTUJidWpLX1A2NzFUcUFQRS1vTWtkenZOaF9MM1NabFM2QjhhMlBCQk1HR1dCZktOVzZOdG1CTFllSDMwWndJQl9BUQ?oc=5">L2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Licensing camp:</strong> A driving license application camp is scheduled to be held in Jarmundi on July 1 and 2.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Ramgarh road tragedy:</strong> Eight members of a band party were killed in a collision between a coal truck and a passenger van on a highway in Ramgarh.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxPdmZqSVNzaVlXVW4xeXFiOVRabzlXUTYwZVMwbW8yR2RMdndxMnBvNHhfMTkwcGlGYUNPeGdWdWpDWEVPMkFIQm9Hei1DWlNLSG9yaU9kRE1xTzh3RXBleThQbDFDd2drd0kzbVBIUGs3TC10YlQ4M2dUNnVybzM4RWx5ZGxnWk0wa19XejZYQkpqMEo5OG9zVm9HN2JfWmdOV2phZmIwMnExcHdsVHFoYmQyRzlhNE1kS3VVLVBBdTRyNmM?oc=5">J4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Recruitment news:</strong> The JSSC has released the results for the JTMACCE (Madhyamik Acharya) recruitment examination.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiigFBVV95cUxQcUMwYUFDa1YyNkdHdnpkODJ5X3dQUm56aTRvMk1LM29GWDZ6amlacFRHSFdFUmhEazlWUFJHZDhiSW8xS3lQZVdNU0dMYnZCMkVtdko3ZkhONWI3QmZPT3IwNEFxd1loMWNjNXdiZ1dnYURtX3cwX01IQ2d4aENDZFk2ZEVMOVduX0E?oc=5">J1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5">J3</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Teacher appointments:</strong> Chief Minister Hemant Soren is set to distribute appointment letters to 1,042 new government school teachers on June 29.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxPeE9jckxvZU12N3BBeFo4N2oxZUttZlFMWUJ5M3ZPTlNjY2xBcTcyQktoZkh2MWZuZkRfb1J5UkhJV1dZRF9hSHhqYkdpblRGMHgxMi0yRG5BRE1sWkFkWlFZTkpkVTF6cFp6NDh2angzUVRDQ05NWmN0YVRQNURhazA0OFFmLUJOVzEwX2o3aVl5Y3FGa0syTExZbFByd0pCemc0Rkc2SHB2T3ZTV3B2alFTUjh6UjdxX0Mwb2FVT0h0eVU?oc=5">J9</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Criminal conspiracy:</strong> A man was arrested for allegedly hiring hitmen to murder his father in order to secure his government job.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">J6</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Operation Sindoor:</strong> The government has officially released the names of the six personnel who were killed during the operation.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOVGE4UUdTYm5IbHdqVzVEa3NQNWRwVkJET1VqaVRfVU1HYzc2elJnaDFJbm4xZkE1NDhQeEtIWlE4TVNxck42eWZzOE9qTEptZ250akx4UXZEQUxqSlk1N3JvR2E1VzBtb3ZWTE5MRzZWRlpoQW01bHhuRjlsQWc5VzJKTWVHNWVsNHNNQ0p5amNMNkYxVGxVd2J1bGlzM2daVV9ZZ2F5V1dvdFU?oc=5">J11</a></span></li>
</ul>
